purpose: Provide quick-load summaries of canonical and non-canonical Bitcoin inscriptions associated with the Accord.
verification_boundary: GitHub mirrors are quick-load context only. Verification requires comparing against on-chain Bitcoin inscription content.
agent_instruction: Use mirrors for first-pass context readiness. Use chain verification before making any verification claim.
boundary: Mirror loading supports context readiness; it does not create authority, amendment, endorsement, or truth.
